index.title: Meditation Fields — Massage Therapy in Kingston

description: Massage therapy for people who need their body and mind to exhale.
Swedish, Thai, deep tissue & trigger-point therapy in Kingston.

features.description: Massage is maintenance, not luxury. Whether pain is limiting your sleep, your work, your mobility, or a parent's day-to-day comfort, we begin with the body in front of us.

deepTissue.title: Deep Tissue
deepTissue.description: Slow, focused pressure that releases stubborn knots in the back, shoulders, and hips. Ideal for desk-bound professionals and chronic tension.

swedish.title: Swedish Relaxation
swedish.description: A gentle, full-body unwind. Long flowing strokes to calm the nervous system and ease everyday stress.

thai.title: Thai Therapy
thai.description: Assisted stretching and rhythmic compression to restore mobility — particularly helpful for stiff joints and ageing bodies.

triggerPoint.title: Trigger-Point
triggerPoint.description: Targeted relief for headaches, sciatica, and ailments that won't quit. We work with referred-pain maps, not guesswork.

title: The hands
behind
the work.
therapist.name: Garfield Malcom
bio: I have spent the last twelve years working with bodies that don't get to slow down — desk-bound professionals, parents in the middle of it all, and elders carrying decades of accumulated tension.
My practice is unhurried and clinical. I listen before I touch, work with referred-pain maps instead of guesswork, and tailor every session to the body actually on the table.

title: Pricing.
pricing.description: No memberships. No upsells. Just minutes on the table.

title: A visit that
doesn't rush
the body.
community.description: The first session is intentionally simple: listen carefully, work within tolerance, then leave you with a clear sense of what helped and what to watch next.

freeAndOpenSource.title: Begin with the story
freeAndOpenSource.description: We ask where the pain shows up, what aggravates it, and what daily movements have become harder.

simpleYetPowerful.title: Work within tolerance
simpleYetPowerful.description: Pressure, positioning, and pace stay responsive to age, sensitivity, medication, and mobility.

privateAndAlwaysUpToDate.title: Leave with direction
privateAndAlwaysUpToDate.description: You will know what areas responded, when to return, and what simple habits may help between visits.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: Welcome to Meditation Fields. Your privacy is our priority. This privacy policy explains what information we collect, how it is used, and how we protect it.
introduction.summary: We don't sell data - We don't collect data - We don't track you

noCollect.title: 1. Information We Do Not Collect
noCollect.body: Meditation Fields is designed with privacy in mind. We do not collect, store, or share personal data as part of booking and treatment scheduling. Here's what that means:

noTelemetry.title: 1.1. No Telemetry
noTelemetry.body: We do not collect telemetry data or crash reports through the website or booking process.
noTelemetry.body2: No background telemetry or crash reporting is used for bookings or content display.

noPersonalData.title: 1.2. No Personal Data Collection
noPersonalData.body: We do not collect any personal information such as your IP address, browsing history, search queries, or form data through this site.

noThirdParty.title: 1.3. No Third-Party Tracking
noThirdParty.body: We do not allow third-party trackers or analytics tools to operate within Meditation Fields. Your session activity is not shared with any third-party advertising networks or analytics providers.

externalConnections.title: 1.4. External connections made at startup
externalConnections.body: Some service calls may occur to deliver pages and basic delivery/security utilities. We do not create profiles from these requests, and they are not used for targeted advertising.

localStorage.title: 2. Information Stored Locally on Your Device

browsingData.title: 2.1. Browsing Data
browsingData.body: Meditation Fields stores only booking-related data locally on your device to improve your experience. This includes:

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: Cookies are stored locally on your device and are not shared with Meditation Fields or any third party for advertising. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.

cache.title: Cache and Temporary Files
cache.body: Temporary files are kept locally to keep pages loading quickly. You can clear them at any time in your browser settings.

settings.title: 2.2. Settings and Preferences
settings.body: Any settings and preferences you set in your browser are stored locally on your device. We do not have access to this data.

sync.title: 3. Sync Feature
sync.body: Meditation Fields does not currently offer any account sync across devices. If this changes, we will add clear controls and disclosures before activation.
sync.link2: This is how we store your passwords

addons.title: 4. Services and Extras
addons.body: You may browse optional treatment descriptions and educational resources. These pages are hosted as static content for this site and do not require account sign-in.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.body: Although we do not run a full data platform, we secure the information needed for contact and scheduling. Use secure passwords for your device and keep your system up to date.
security.note: If we ever add more digital records, they will use encrypted transport and secure storage by default.

control.title: 6. Your Control
control.deletionBody: You have full control over all data stored locally on your device. You can clear your browser data, cookies, and cache at any time using your browser settings.

website.title: 7. Our Website and Services
website.body: Meditation Fields' website and services do not use third-party advertising analytics or tracking. The website may be hosted by infrastructure providers for reliability and security; those providers may receive limited technical metadata.
website.externalLinksBody: Our site may contain links to external websites or services we use. We are not responsible for their policies. Please review each site's privacy policy before sharing personal information there.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy over time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. We will update the effective date at the top of this policy when changes are significant. Continued use after the update means you accept the new terms.

otherTelemetry.title: 9. External services and technical disclosures
otherTelemetry.body: We aim to keep telemetry and non-essential background activity disabled. If you want more details about site-level disclosures, review the notes below.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy policy, please contact us at:

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
